title: Protocol Integration

orchestrator_protocol: ## Backpressure Gate - when/how to run, interpret results, escalation path
## Struggle Detection - patterns, status levels, actions
## Loop Runner (For Stuck Workers) - usage, safety limits, success criteria
## Build Health Dashboard - consolidated view command
backpressure_protocol: When to run (during builds, outside builds)

dashboard_features.worker_progress: Lists all workers with completion status icons

lessons_learned: backpressure.py returns validators as array of objects, not dict - needed to handle both formats
Wave 1 scripts use consistent --json flag convention which simplified integration
notes_for_orchestrator: All protocol docs and dashboard integrated successfully. Dashboard tested against ralph-learnings build - shows 3/4 workers complete (W1.1, W1.2, W1.3), backpressure WARN (all validators SKIP since no Python/test files in build folder itself), and struggle HEALTHY. The dashboard handles both the list-format validators from backpressure.py and handles missing scripts gracefully with stub detection.
